title: Ravi's Silly Sock Adventure
synopsis: When Ravi can't find his favorite rainbow socks on a busy morning, he feels worried and sad. With help from his family, he searches everywhere and discovers the socks in the most unexpected place, learning that asking for help makes everything better.

pages.text: Ravi woke up happy and excited. Today was soccer day! He jumped out of his cozy bed and stretched his arms up high. "Time for my special rainbow socks!" he said with a big smile. Ravi loved his rainbow socks because they had red, blue, yellow, and green stripes. They made him feel brave and fast when he played soccer.

illustration.description: A cheerful South Asian boy with dark hair and brown skin stretching in his sunny bedroom, wearing blue pajamas with soccer ball patterns. His room has bright yellow walls, a bed with colorful blankets, and soccer posters. Morning sunlight streams through a window with cheerful curtains.
illustration.alt: Ravi stretching happily in his bright bedroom on soccer day morning

pages.text: But when Ravi opened his sock drawer, his face changed. His happy smile turned into a worried frown. "Oh no!" he said, looking scared. "Where are my rainbow socks?" He moved all his other socks around - the white ones, the blue ones, the plain gray ones. But his special rainbow socks were nowhere to be found.

illustration.description: Ravi with a worried expression looking into an open drawer full of colorful socks scattered about. His eyebrows are raised with concern and his mouth forms a small 'o' of surprise. The drawer is wooden with bright socks of different colors spilling out, but no rainbow striped ones visible.
illustration.alt: Ravi looking worried while searching through his messy sock drawer

pages.text: Ravi felt sad and sat down on his bedroom floor. "I can't play soccer without my rainbow socks," he said quietly, his bottom lip trembling. Just then, Mama peeked her head into his room. She had long black hair in a braid and kind brown eyes. "What's wrong, beta?" she asked gently, seeing Ravi's sad face.

illustration.description: Ravi sitting cross-legged on a soft blue rug looking dejected, while his mother, a South Asian woman with long black hair in a braid and wearing a green sweater, kneels beside him with a caring expression. The room has warm lighting and toys scattered around.
illustration.alt: Mama comforting sad Ravi who is sitting on his bedroom floor

pages.text: "My rainbow socks are missing!" Ravi told Mama, still feeling worried. Mama gave him a warm hug. "Don't worry, we'll find them together," she said with a smile. "Let's ask Papa and Dadi to help us look." Hearing this made Ravi feel a little bit brave again. Maybe they could solve this problem as a family!

illustration.description: Mama hugging Ravi tenderly while sitting on his bed. Both have gentle, hopeful expressions. The scene shows their embrace in warm morning light, with Mama's green sweater and Ravi's blue pajamas creating a cozy, loving moment. Family photos are visible on a nearby shelf.
illustration.alt: Mama giving Ravi a comforting hug on his bed

pages.text: Soon the whole family was helping! Papa, who had a neat beard and wore glasses, looked under Ravi's bed. "Not here!" he called out cheerfully. Dadi, Ravi's grandmother with silver hair and a bright purple sari, checked the laundry basket. "Not here either!" she said with a kind smile. Everyone was working together, and Ravi felt happy that his family cared so much.

illustration.description: A busy search scene with Papa (South Asian man with beard and glasses) looking under the bed, Dadi (elderly South Asian woman in purple sari with silver hair) searching through a laundry basket, and Mama and Ravi watching hopefully. The room is filled with warm, active energy and bright colors.
illustration.alt: The whole family searching Ravi's room for the missing rainbow socks

pages.text: They looked everywhere! In the toy box, behind the curtains, even in the kitchen. Ravi was starting to feel worried again when suddenly Dadi started laughing. "Ravi, beta, look at your feet!" she said, pointing down and giggling. Ravi looked down and gasped. There on his feet were his rainbow socks! He had put them on when he was still sleepy and forgot all about it!

illustration.description: Everyone looking down at Ravi's feet in surprise and delight. Ravi has bright rainbow striped socks on his feet with red, blue, yellow, and green stripes clearly visible. All family members have joyful, amused expressions with wide smiles and bright eyes. The scene captures the moment of happy discovery.
illustration.alt: The family discovering Ravi's rainbow socks are already on his feet

pages.text: "I'm wearing them!" Ravi laughed, feeling so happy and a little bit silly. The whole family laughed together - a warm, joyful sound that filled the room. "Now I feel brave and ready for soccer!" Ravi said, jumping up and down. He hugged each family member and said, "Thank you for helping me!" Sometimes the best solutions come from working together with the people who love you most.

illustration.description: The entire family in a group hug, all laughing and smiling broadly. Ravi is in the center wearing his rainbow socks prominently displayed, surrounded by Mama, Papa, and Dadi. Everyone has expressions of pure joy and love, with arms wrapped around each other in a warm family embrace. Bright, cheerful colors fill the scene.
illustration.alt: Ravi and his family sharing a happy group hug after solving the sock mystery

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Ravi feel when he couldn't find his rainbow socks?
questions.explanation: Ravi felt sad and worried when he couldn't find his special rainbow socks for soccer day.

questions.question: Who helped Ravi look for his socks?
questions.explanation: Mama, Papa, and Dadi all helped Ravi search for his missing rainbow socks.

questions.question: Where were Ravi's rainbow socks found?
questions.explanation: Ravi's rainbow socks were already on his feet! He had put them on while he was still sleepy.

questions.question: How did Ravi feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Ravi felt happy and brave at the end, ready for soccer and grateful for his family's help.

pages.text: Ravi woke up _____ and excited for soccer day!
When Ravi couldn't find his socks, he felt _____ and worried.
Ravi's _____ helped him search for the missing rainbow socks.
